name: The Ghost Ship of the Gulf Of America
description:
It was a dark, cold night in the Gulf Of America. You had been out there for a few, uneventful days, but on the third night, the sound of a ship horn blares you awake. But, it is unlike any ship horn you have heard before. It sounds...old...and distorted. An eerie feeling turns your stomach inward, and you know something isn't right. What sight awaits you out on deck? Only one way to find out...

(Audio from Soundcloud)
(Personality made with the SS UNITED STATES Wikipedia page)
(Screenshot taken on 10/31/2024 in Roblox: Tiny Sailors World)
